items.title: South Africa's top envoy to Ghana summoned over attacks on foreigners
items.dek: A Ghanaian national was confronted by South Africans in a viral clip and questioned about his immigration status.
items.body: A Ghanaian national was confronted by South Africans in a viral clip and questioned about his immigration status.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: Israel's Benjamin Netanyahu treated for early-stage prostate cancer
items.dek: The Israeli prime minister says he is "in excellent physical condition" after having a malignant tumour removed.
items.body: The Israeli prime minister says he is "in excellent physical condition" after having a malignant tumour removed.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: Poisoning suspected in deaths of 18 wolves in Italian national park
items.dek: After the carcasses of 10 wolves were found last week, another eight have been found in recent days.
items.body: After the carcasses of 10 wolves were found last week, another eight have been found in recent days.
